product.title: Pink Muhly Grass - Muhlenbergia capillaris
product.body_html:
The Pink Muhly Grass is one of the showiest ornamental grasses you can grow. In fall, this grass erupts with cotton-candy pink flower plumes.

Zones6, 7, 8, 9, 10, 11
SunFull Sun
Height3-4 feet tall
Width3-4 feet wide
Bloom SeasonFall
TypeOrnamental Grass
